svg.aria-label: AWS re:Inforce 2025 conference in Philadelphia draws 5800 security practitioners, GuardDuty Extended Threat Detection cuts mean detect time 60% while Security Hub GA automates compliance, IAM Policy Autopilot tunes least-privilege at scale, AgentCore Identity prepares for AI agent era with guardrails and Zero Trust verification.
